title: Add review AI coding output before merge guide and route top-level docs toward it
why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is flat while external lanes are either in active measurement windows, saturated, or blocked.
Shared findings keep pointing to the trust gap between an agent saying done and a result a developer would actually merge.
A durable repo-native guide can improve the first-click evaluation path now without waiting on external account access.

docs_change_brief.user_problem_addressed: Evaluators need a clearer repo-native answer to the question: how do I decide whether AI coding output actually earned a merge?
docs_change_brief.target_audience: Developers and technical teams evaluating unattended AI coding workflows for real repo work.
docs_change_brief.why_this_surface: The guide answers one high-intent trust question, while README and START_HERE are the shortest path to place that answer in front of repo visitors.
docs_change_brief.what_was_shortened_removed_merged: README quick-link count stayed at four by swapping a top-level example route for the stronger review guide instead of adding another branch.

docs_review_note.what_changed: Added a focused review-before-merge guide and routed README/START_HERE toward it for the trust/verification pain frame.
docs_review_note.why_it_belongs_here: This is a concrete evaluator question that belongs one layer below README while still being promoted from the first-run path.
docs_review_note.what_was_pruned_shortened_merged: Kept README quick-link count flat by promoting the new guide instead of expanding the top-level link set.
docs_review_note.why_top_level_is_better: The first-click path now answers the finish-line trust question more directly without adding link sprawl.

measurement_window.success_metric: This guide becomes part of the repo-first evaluation path and contributes to clearer qualified inspection or Codeberg star/watch/fork movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If Codeberg remains flat after the current external measurement windows close and this guide still has no visible reuse in distribution or conversion surfaces, replace it with a stronger proof asset instead of another light docs pass.
